recommendations.title: Super Troopers
recommendations.overview: Five bored, occasionally high and always ineffective Vermont state troopers must prove their worth to the governor or lose their jobs. After stumbling on a drug ring, they plan to make a bust, but a rival police force is out to steal the glory.

recommendations.title: Club Dread
recommendations.overview: When a serial killer interrupts the fun at the swanky Coconut Pete's Coconut Beach Resort -- a hedonistic island paradise for swingers --- it's up to the club's staff to stop the violence ... or at least hide it!

recommendations.title: Super Troopers 2
recommendations.overview: When an international border dispute arises between the U.S. and Canada, the Super Troopers- Mac, Thorny, Foster, Rabbit and Farva, are called in to set up a new Highway Patrol station in the disputed area.

recommendations.title: Beerfest
recommendations.overview: During a trip to Germany to scatter their grandfather's ashes, German-American brothers Todd and Jan discover Beerfest, the secret Olympics of downing stout, and want to enter the contest to defend their family's beer-guzzling honor. Their Old Countr

recommendations.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
recommendations.overview: Cousins, Bo and Luke Duke, with the help of their eye-catching cousin, Daisy and moonshine-running Uncle Jesse, try and save the family farm from being destroyed by Hazzard County's corrupt commissioner, Boss Hogg. Their efforts constantly find the '

recommendations.title: We Are Pregnant
recommendations.overview: It seems simple: an egg + sperm = one embryo. But if your sperm is "few, vague and abnormal" and your woman is premenopausal at age 37, things start to get complicated.

recommendations.title: Paris, Texas
recommendations.overview: A man wanders out of the desert not knowing who he is. His brother finds him, and helps to pull his memory back of the life he led before he walked out on his family and disappeared four years earlier.

recommendations.title: Vicky Donor
recommendations.overview: A man is brought in by an infertility doctor to supply him with his sperm, where he becomes the biggest sperm donor for his clinic.

recommendations.title: Joy of Fatherhood
recommendations.overview: A sperm donor becomes impotent - and so he searches for the woman, who got his sperm, to become a father after all...

recommendations.title: Henry's Crime
recommendations.overview: An aimless man is sent to prison for a crime he did not commit, an ex-con targets the same bank he was sent away for robbing.
